recipe.title: Slow-cooker beef curry
recipe.description: As slow cooker recipes go, this is definitely up there! Beautifully tender beef, fragrant spiced broth and lots of lovely veg – yes please.

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh coriander
½ x 180g jar of your favourite curry paste
½ x 400g tin of light coconut milk

steps.descr: Peel and finely chop the onion, garlic and ginger
steps.instructions: Peel and finely chop the onion, garlic and ginger. Finely chop the coriander stalks, putting the leaves aside in a bowl of cold water for garnish. Deseed and roughly chop the peppers, then halve the cherry tomatoes. Toss the beef with a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely chop the onion, garlic and ginger. Finely chop the coriander stalks, putting the leaves aside in a bowl of cold water for garnish. Deseed and roughly chop the peppers, then halve the cherry tomatoes. Toss the beef with a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Place a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat with...
steps.instructions: Place a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and fry the beef for 5 minutes, then go in with the chopped veg, coriander stalks and 1 tablespoon of oil. Stir in the curry paste and cook for 2 minutes, or until the beef is beautifully golden. Add a splash of water to the pan to deglaze it, if needed.

on_enter.say: Place a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and fry the beef for 5 minutes, then go in with the chopped veg, coriander stalks and 1 tablespoon of oil. Stir in the curry paste and cook for 2 minutes, or until the beef is beautifully golden. Add a splash of water to the pan to deglaze it, if needed.

steps.descr: Transfer the contents of the pan to the slow cooker*,...
steps.instructions: Transfer the contents of the pan to the slow cooker*, add enough water to cover the beef (around 200ml) and cook the highest setting for 3 hours, or the lowest setting for 8 hours, until the beef is tender, then stir in the coconut milk.

on_enter.say: Transfer the contents of the pan to the slow cooker*, add enough water to cover the beef (around 200ml) and cook the highest setting for 3 hours, or the lowest setting for 8 hours, until the beef is tender, then stir in the coconut milk.

steps.descr: Scatter over the reserved coriander leaves and serve...
steps.instructions:
Scatter over the reserved coriander leaves and serve with fluffy rice, poppadoms and your favourite chutney and pickles.

*Tested in a 6.5-litre slow cooker. All slow cookers are different, so results may vary.

on_enter.say:
Scatter over the reserved coriander leaves and serve with fluffy rice, poppadoms and your favourite chutney and pickles.

*Tested in a 6.5-litre slow cooker. All slow cookers are different, so results may vary.
